title: Sneachers SMP Pack
description: A sci-fi 1.20 modpack made for Sneachers SMP. Successor to the Preachers SMP pack.
body: Official modpack of the Sneachers SMP. Centered around TARDIS Refined, this pack allows y'all to get just a little bit more Doctor Who in your life. Plus exploration through BOP, QOL improvements with FallingTree and Jade, and even more tech with the Thermals, Refined Storage, and others. Successor to my previous modpack, because we decided to move up to 1.20.
